questions.question: Describe the steps involved in ER-to-Relational mapping, focusing on how to transform entity types into relational tables. (6 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the process of transforming entity types into relational tables, including attribute refinement and data type modification

questions.question: An entity-relationship diagram (ERD) represents a football club with its players. A player can have one position and one team. How would you map this ERD into a relational database design using ER-to-Relational mapping? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the steps involved in mapping the ERD into a relational database design, including the creation of tables, attributes, and relationships

questions.question: Identify the following entities and attributes in a hospital management system: Patient, Doctor, Appointment. (5 marks)
questions.hint: List the entities and their corresponding attributes, ensuring that you capture all relevant information
